title: 毎日王冠の後に・でけえ背中

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The victor of the Mainichi Okan is Oguri Cap.
Inari One becomes panicked with the thought
that she might not make it as Umamusume of the
Year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, she overhears the fans talking and
realizes her performance wasn't enough to prove
the might of the Oi racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal race, the autumn Tenno Sho, is
right around the corner, but Inari One grows
increasingly flustered as her goals seem to slip
further away from her grasp.
